wordplay_note: His friendliness is artificial — he is an android himself
card_description: Buster Friendly (meaning "Buster = breaker; Friendly = ironic facade") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. TV and radio host who broadcasts 23 hours a day and exposes Mercer as a hoax. Name note: His friendliness is artificial — he is an android himself. Media as destroyer of shared meaning — the friendly face of nihilism. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
work_list: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
